message:
test(frankenpandas): add Duplicate Handling integration test (br-96fna / fd90.164)

fd90.164: locks in fd90.116 + fd90.122 signature fixes for
df.duplicated/drop_duplicates and the Index::drop_duplicates_keep
no-Result contract. The README's 'Duplicate Handling' section
(lines 1605-1622) wasn't covered by integration tests.

Fix: add 'readme_duplicate_handling_compiles_and_runs' which mirrors
the README example. Constructs a 5-row DataFrame with duplicate
values (1, 2, 1, 2, 3) and a 4-element Index with explicit duplicate
labels (1, 2, 1, 3) and verifies:
  - df.duplicated(None, DuplicateKeep::First)? returns 5-element bool Series
  - df.drop_duplicates(None, DuplicateKeep::First, false)? keeps 3 unique
  - series.drop_duplicates()? on a Series (no-arg variant)
  - dup_index.has_duplicates() returns bool directly (no Result, no ?)
  - dup_index.drop_duplicates_keep(DuplicateKeep::First) returns Index
    of length 3 (no Result)

Note: the original ill-fated test conflated row-value dups with
Index-label dups (read_csv_str gives unique 0,1,2,3 row indices, so
has_duplicates always returns false on those). Fixed by constructing
the duplicate-label index via Index::new(vec![...]).

Verified:
- cargo test -p frankenpandas — 7 lib + 10 integration + 2 doctests
  all pass

Pure additive test. No behavior change.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
